'''habaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphioid|xiphioid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-b-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphioid|xiphioid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| habaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæbæjæth|hæbæjæth]] || [[word:hæbæjæj|hæbæjæj]] || [[word:hæbæjæsh|hæbæjæsh]] || [[word:hæbæjæ|hæbæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hababajath|hababajath]] || [[word:hababajaj|hababajaj]] || [[word:hababajash|hababajash]] || [[word:hababaja|hababaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:habajath|habajath]] || [[word:habajaj|habajaj]] || [[word:habajash|habajash]] || [[word:habaja|habaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:habafjath|habafjath]] || [[word:habafjaj|habafjaj]] || [[word:habafjash|habafjash]] || [[word:habafjaf|habafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:habajatha|habajatha]] || [[word:habajaja|habajaja]] || [[word:habajasha|habajasha]] || [[word:habajaka|habajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:habajath|habajath]] || [[word:habajaj|habajaj]] || [[word:habajash|habajash]] || [[word:habaja|habaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:habajathal|habajathal]] || [[word:habajajal|habajajal]] || [[word:habajashal|habajashal]] || [[word:habajakal|habajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:habajathatha|habajathatha]] || [[word:habajajaja|habajajaja]] || [[word:habajashasha|habajashasha]] || [[word:habajaka|habajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:habajathan|habajathan]] || [[word:habajajan|habajajan]] || [[word:habajashan|habajashan]] || [[word:habajakan|habajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:habajathaoro|habajathaoro]] || [[word:habajajaoro|habajajaoro]] || [[word:habajashaoro|habajashaoro]] || [[word:habajakaoro|habajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
